summary: Added comprehensive suite of SEO skills including seo-audit, seo-authority-builder, seo-content-auditor, seo-content-planner, seo-content-refresher, seo-content-writer, seo-fundamentals, seo-keyword-strategist, seo-meta-optimizer, seo-snippet-hunter, and seo-structure-architect. These skills cover SEO auditing, authority building, content planning and creation, fundamentals, keyword strategy, meta optimization, snippet hunting, and content structure optimization.
